# @nifrajs/cache — LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand — run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

Typed KV cache for nifra — TTL, stale-while-revalidate, tag invalidation, and single-flight stampede protection on a pluggable store (in-memory default; bring CF KV / Redis). Dependency-free, runs on Bun/Node/Deno/Workers.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

- **CacheOptions** _(interface)_ — `interface CacheOptions`
- **CacheStore** _(interface)_ — `interface CacheStore`
- **MemoryCacheOptions** _(interface)_ — `interface MemoryCacheOptions`
- **SetOptions** _(interface)_ — `interface SetOptions`
- **StoredEntry** _(interface)_ — `interface StoredEntry`
- **WrapOptions** _(type)_ — `type WrapOptions = SetOptions`
